prompt: Tap river to finalize the track context.
why_v1: Final board anchor prevents over-thinking late decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. river is the final board anchor, so the line closes with the last card that decides the full texture.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The river card matters because the river locks in whether the balanced line ends as thin value, bluff-catching, or a clean fold.
